title: Surf and Turf
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''"Surf and Turf"''' referred to a dish that contained meat from both land animals and of sea-dwelling creatures. [[Ladnek]]s were sea creatures that were sometimes found in a "Surf and Turf" meal.

==Behind the scenes==
In real life, Surf and Turf is an actual main course meal typically consisting of seafood as well as meat. A lot of times it contains lobster as well as beef steak.

==Appearances==
*''[[Rebel Dawn]]''
